name: rocketpy-landing-page
description: RocketPy landing page - Advanced rocket trajectory simulator

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:html
scripts.build:css: npm run minify:css:main && npm run minify:css:footer && npm run minify:css:about
scripts.build:html: npm run minify:html:index && npm run minify:html:about
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const copyDir = (src, dest) => { fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(file => { const srcPath = src + '/' + file; const destPath = dest + '/' + file; if (fs.statSync(srcPath).isDirectory()) { fs.mkdirSync(destPath, {recursive: true}); copyDir(srcPath, destPath); } else { fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, destPath); } }); }; copyDir('images', 'dist/images'); copyDir('about-images', 'dist/about-images'); copyDir('css/font-awesome', 'dist/css/font-awesome');"
